channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Former England manager Gareth Southgate says he won't coach in the next year
item.description: ATHENS, Greece (AP) — Former England coach Gareth Southgate said Thursday he will be taking a year away from a club or national team job, after speculation he could be a target for Manchester United. “I won’t coach in the next year, for sure.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Back in the WNBA Finals, East Bay’s Ionescu on cusp of capping off banner year with title
item.description: A year after losing to the Las Vegas in the WNBA Finals, Sabrina Ionescu and the New York Liberty will have a shot at redemption against the Minnesota Lynx.
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: National Women's Soccer League faces lawsuit as former employee alleges sexual assault
item.description: Five former employees of San Diego Wave have filed a lawsuit against the club and the National Women's Soccer League alleging multiple forms of discrimination.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 22-time Grand Slam champion Rafael Nadal will retire from tennis after next month's Davis Cup finals
item.description: Rafael Nadal is retiring from professional tennis at age 38 after winning 22 Grand Slam titles — 14 at the French Open — during an unprecedented era he shared with rivals Roger Federer and Novak Djokovic.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jets firing Robert Saleh will do nothing to fix their offense, Ex-NFL player says
item.description: Former NFL player Solomon Wilcots said during a recent appearance on OutKick's "The Ricky Cobb Show" that the Jets firing Robert Saleh does nothing towards solving their main issue.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Betts and Ohtani help the Dodgers stay alive in NLDS with 8-0 win vs the Padres
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Mookie Betts homered for the second straight night, Shohei Ohtani hit an RBI single and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat Dylan Cease and the San Diego Padres 8-0 on Wednesday night to force a deciding Game 5 in their tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Francisco Lindor's grand slam sends Mets into NLCS with 4-1 win over Phillies in Game 4 of NLDS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Francisco Lindor hit a grand slam in the sixth inning, his latest clutch swing in a storybook season full of them, and the New York Mets reached the National League Championship Series with a 4-1 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Melania Trump speaks out against transgenders in women's sports: 'Seeing that dream collapse'
item.description: Former first lady Melania Trump spoke out against transgender inclusion in women's sports in an excerpt of her new memoir, calling it "unfair.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mets postseason tickets outsell Yankees on StubHub
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – The Mets and Yankees are both looking to make a run this postseason, but the Amazins are selling more tickets than the Bronx Bombers, according to StubHub. The Mets-Phillies National League Division Series was the best-selling series of the 2024 postseason on StubHub.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers is placed on commissioner's exempt list after his arrest
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — The NFL has placed New England Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers on the exempt list while he goes through the legal process following his arrest on charges that he shoved his girlfriend’s head into the wall and choked her.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chicago Fire FC names Gregg Berhalter, former U.S. Men's National Team coach, as director of football and head coach
item.description: CHICAGO — Chicago Fire FC has hired former U.S. Men's National Soccer Team head coach Gregg Berhalter as its head coach and director of football, the Major League Soccer team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Padres return to Petco Park in NLDS: What to know before you go
item.description: San Diego Padres fans are ecstatic to welcome back their team to Petco Park for games three and four of the National League Division Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Caleb Williams, Bears offense overwhelm Panthers, advance to 3-2
item.description: CHICAGO — Caleb Williams continued his improvement with a breakout game Sunday against the Carolina Panthers, as the Chicago Bears used a first-half offensive blitz to cruise to an easy victory Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: NASCAR playoffs roll into Talladega as cloud of lawsuit hangs over sport
item.description: It's most fitting that NASCAR this weekend races at Talladega Superspeedway, the sight of one of the first major disputes between drivers and the top stock car series in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Who plays for the Los Angeles Clippers this year? Here's a breakdown of the roster
item.description: Yet another NBA offseason has come and gone, with some major free agent signings taking place and some big names being selected in this year’s draft.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: LeBron James reveals why he joined the Lakers
item.description: The NBA season is right around the corner, but the league's oldest player still had some time on his hands on Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Jazz counting on Hendricks and George to take big strides
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With its commitment to a youth movement, the Utah Jazz are counting on Keyonte George and Taylor Hendricks to both take big strides in their second seasons this year. After playing in 75 games as a rookie, George wore down a bit at the end of the year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cal WBB player makes a splash with sneaker design
item.description: BERKELEY, Calif. (KRON) -- Hooper by day, artist by night. That's life for Cal Berkeley women's basketball player Jayda Noble. The senior guard has balanced her nonstop basketball schedule with her other passion -- sneaker design.
item.dc:creator: Jason Dumas, KRON4

item.title: Fans set to camp out for Cal Bears big game
item.description: (KRON) – It will be a busy weekend for the City of Berkeley as the Cal Bears football team is hosting a college game day show for the first time in over 30 years. The Bears are currently (3-1) and are looking to knock off the eighth-seed and undefeated Miami Hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Shaboozey to perform prior to Utah Hockey Club's first home game
item.description: The National Hockey League has announced that the creator of the smash hit "A Bar Song (Tipsy)," Shaboozey will perform outside of the Delta Center ahead of the Utah Hockey Club's first regular season game.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Mahon, ABC 4
